package.name: ai_control_bridge_core
package.description:
Core library providing abstract interfaces and header-only implementations for the AI Control Bridge system.
Includes base classes for: - Controller Bridge (ros2_control integration) - Trajectory Generation (motion planning) - Safety Constraints (limits enforcement) - Realtime-safe Buffer (lock-free communication)
Designed as a header-only library for maximum flexibility and zero overhead. Supports robots with any number of joints (N-DOF generalization).
package.author: AI Robotics Team
